advertisements.description: Great Reduction Sale. Supply your need now and save from one-third to one-half on all purchases. In order to make room for our big fall stock, which is already arriving on every express and freight, we are going to give the people some of the greatest values ever known. All summer merchandise must go regardless of cost. High prices are on vacation in this store, Don't take our word for it but come and see for yourself. No old mussed-up goods but all this season's high class merchandise. Clark's guarantee stands behind every dollar's worth you buy. And if not satisfactory, we will exchange it or your money cheerfully refunded. Extra help in all departments.
